Legal Document

Terms & Conditions

Please read these terms carefully before using Stylist BGMI. By using our service you agree to the following conditions.

Effective: 1 January 2026Last updated: May 2026Jurisdiction: India

Contents

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Stylist BGMI (the Service), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately.

We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access the Service.

2. Description of Service

Stylist BGMI is a free, web-based tool that generates stylised name suggestions for use in the game Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI).

The Service provides font transformations, symbol libraries, and name combination suggestions based on publicly available Unicode characters.

The Service is provided as-is without any guarantees of availability, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose.

We do not guarantee that any generated name will be accepted by BGMI. Game rules are subject to change by Krafton at any time.

3. Acceptable Use

You may use the Service for personal, non-commercial name generation purposes only.

You must not use the Service to generate names that contain hate speech, slurs, threats, or discriminatory content.

You must not attempt to scrape, clone, reverse-engineer, or republish the Service or its generated content for commercial purposes.

You must not use automated bots or scripts to access the Service at a rate that disrupts normal operation.

You agree to comply with all applicable laws and BGMI's own Terms of Service when using generated names.

4. Intellectual Property

BGMI, Battlegrounds Mobile India, and all related trademarks are the property of Krafton Inc. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Krafton.

The design, code, and original content of this Service are owned by Stylist BGMI. All rights reserved.

Unicode characters used in font transformations are part of the public Unicode standard and are not proprietary to this Service.

You retain no intellectual property rights over generated name suggestions — they are transformations of your own input.

5. Disclaimers & Limitation of Liability

The Service is provided without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.

We are not liable for any account bans, name rejections, or penalties imposed by Krafton resulting from use of names generated by this Service.

We are not responsible for any loss of data, Rename Cards, or in-game currency spent on names that are subsequently rejected.

Our total liability for any claim arising from use of the Service is limited to zero, as this is a free service.

6. Privacy

We do not collect, store, or share personal data. Names you type into the generator are processed entirely client-side in your browser.

We do not use tracking cookies, advertising pixels, or third-party analytics that collect personally identifiable information.

Standard server access logs (IP address, timestamp, requested URL) may be retained for up to 30 days for security purposes, then deleted.

We do not sell, rent, or share any user data with third parties.

7. Contact

For questions, concerns, or DMCA notices regarding these terms, please reach out via our community channels.

We aim to respond to all legitimate queries within 5 business days.

For bug reports or feature requests, please use the feedback option within the app.

Your Agreement

By continuing to use Stylist BGMI you confirm you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms and Conditions in full. If you are under 13 years of age, please have a parent or guardian review these terms with you.

Return to Generator

© 2026 Stylist BGMI. Not affiliated with Krafton Inc.
